overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City's elevated highways during golden hour. The journey transitions from industrial concrete overpasses to neon-lit commercial districts with holographic billboards, then through covered digital highways before emerging to open viaducts with the city skyline visible against a sunset sky.

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling ahead in the same lane at a distance

tall concrete safety barrier running along the right side of the roadway
metal railings on the overpass structure visible beyond the concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated industrial highway with concrete barriers lining both sides of the asphalt road. The camera moves forward under massive concrete overpass structures with metal safety railings visible. The lighting is natural golden hour sun, casting long shadows across the roadway. Sparse traffic is visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial highway entrance with neon signage and holographic billboards

events.description: transition from industrial concrete highway to neon-lit commercial district with holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving into the commercial district passing vibrant neon signs and digital billboards on the right side

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with bright illumination visible on the right side of the highway
tall tower displaying holographic advertisements rising above the highway
modern glass facade skyscraper visible ahead in the city center
highway direction signage suspended over the roadway

segments.scene_description: The industrial landscape gives way to a commercial district as vibrant pink neon signs and holographic advertisement towers appear on the right. The concrete barriers remain visible but appear further away as the road widens slightly. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance ahead, and the lighting shifts to a mix of natural sunset and artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway canyon with dense digital billboards and overhead displays

events.description: entering heavily covered highway section with reduced natural light and dominant neon illumination from surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: navigating through the covered commercial canyon surrounded by towering digital advertisements and neon signage

notable_agents.action: red vehicle ahead maintaining speed in the same lane

entered.detail: large digital billboard suspended overhead displaying animated advertisements
solid roof structure covering the highway with integrated lighting
dense cluster of neon signs and commercial lighting on the right side buildings
pedestrian walkway bridge crossing over the highway above

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a covered urban canyon where the sky is mostly blocked by overhead structures and digital billboards. The lighting shifts dramatically to a cyberpunk aesthetic with dominant neon illumination from dense signage clusters on the right. The road continues straight with moderate traffic ahead, surrounded by towering commercial buildings and overhead walkway bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with transparent digital roof displays and emerging city skyline views

events.description: transitioning from covered commercial canyon to elevated highway with transparent digital roof and open skyline views
steering right to navigate highway curve while overtaking slower vehicles in the left lane

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated highway curves with digital overhead displays while overtaking slower vehicles and avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving parallel in the right lane
dark vehicle being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: transparent sections of highway roof with integrated digital displays showing advertisements
cluster of high-rise towers forming the distant city skyline visible through the transparent roof
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
tall modern building with reflective glass facade visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: The highway emerges from the solid covered section into a partially covered viaduct with transparent roof sections displaying digital advertisements. The city skyline becomes visible in the distance through the transparent roof. The driver navigates a right curve, overtaking vehicles on the left while a silver sedan drives parallel on the right. Modern glass towers and highway support pillars line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway viaduct with panoramic city skyline at sunset

events.description: emerging from covered highway section into full golden hour sunlight with clear open sky and panoramic city views

agents.ego_description: cruising on open highway with clear view of the city skyline against the sunset, maintaining speed with surrounding traffic

entered.detail: open elevated highway section without roof covering, exposing the sky above
overhead directional signage indicating highway exits and routes
panoramic view of the city skyline illuminated by golden hour sunset light

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a wide elevated viaduct with full sky visibility and no overhead coverage. The golden hour sunset illuminates the city skyline ahead, which now appears closer and more detailed. Highway direction signs are visible overhead. The concrete barriers have dropped away, revealing open views on both sides as the vehicle cruises toward the distant towers with moderate traffic surrounding the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey along an elevated highway that transforms from a stark industrial overpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban corridor before opening up to a panoramic city skyline. It begins under massive concrete structures and metal railings bathed in the long shadows of the golden hour sun. As the road widens, the industrial gray gives way to a commercial district where pink neon signs and holographic towers blend with the natural sunset glow. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon, where the sky is eclipsed by overhead structures and intense digital billboards, before emerging onto a partially covered viaduct with transparent roofing. Finally, the highway opens completely to the sky, revealing a detailed skyline illuminated by the setting sun as the vehicle cruises past overhead direction signs toward the distant towers.
